labels.name: Name of the location (Required)
labels.nameInfo: Enter the name of the location where the event takes place
labels.addressInfo: Indicate the street number, street name, postal code and city name
labels.descriptionInfo: Describe your location (its history, features, activities offered, etc.)
labels.accessInfo: Indicate access conditions to your location
labels.phoneInfo: Indicate a contact phone number for the public
labels.websiteInfo: Indicate the website of the location (include http:// or https://)
labels.emailInfo: Provide a contact email for inquiries
labels.imageInfo: Only upload images you have the right to use
labels.imageCreditsInfo: Indicate the owner of the image
labels.linksInfo: Add social media pages or other relevant links
